hero.title: Notification System

adminNotifications.apiNotReady: No data available (API not ready yet)

typeMessages.status_changed: The status of proposal {proposalCode} has been updated. Please log in to the system to view the details.
typeMessages.revision_requested:
Dear {recipientName},

Your research proposal has been reviewed and revision is required. Please log in to the system to view the comments and make the necessary corrections within the deadline.

Sincerely,
Research Administration Division
typeMessages.evaluation_edit_request:
Dear {recipientName},

An edit request has been submitted for the evaluation of proposal {proposalCode}. Please log in to review the details.

Sincerely,
Research Administration Division
typeMessages.approved:
Dear {recipientName},

Congratulations! Your research proposal {proposalCode} has been approved. Please log in to the system for more details.

Sincerely,
Research Administration Division
typeMessages.rejected:
Dear {recipientName},

Your research proposal {proposalCode} was not approved in this round. Please log in to the system to view the reason.

Sincerely,
Research Administration Division
typeMessages.committee_valuated: The review meeting for proposal {proposalCode} has been completed and the results have been recorded.
typeMessages.meeting_completed: The meeting for proposal {proposalCode} has been completed. The office is now preparing the results.
typeMessages.collaboration_confirmation:
Dear {recipientName},

This is a request to confirm your collaboration on proposal {proposalCode}. Please log in to the system to confirm.

Sincerely,
Research Administration Division
typeMessages.meeting_scheduled:
Dear {recipientName},

Please be informed of the upcoming research project review meeting related to proposal {proposalCode}. Please prepare your documents and attend the meeting as scheduled.

Sincerely,
Research Administration Division,
Mae Fah Luang University
typeMessages.document_required:
Dear {recipientName},

Additional documents are required for proposal {proposalCode}. Please log in to the system to view the details and submit the required documents.

Sincerely,
Research Administration Division
typeMessages.committee_assigned:
Dear {recipientName},

You have been assigned to review proposal {proposalCode}. Please log in to the system to view the proposal details.

Sincerely,
Research Administration Division
typeMessages.announcement:
Dear {recipientName},

This is a general announcement from the Research Administration Division. Please log in to the system for more details.

Sincerely,
Research Administration Division

workflow.note: Note: Current workflow allows continuous review/revision rounds until admin finalizes and announces results.
workflow.statusNote: This is a simplified overview of the proposal journey. The main line shows the normal path, while the boxes below show special cases that may happen along the way.
workflow.revisionLoopNote: When changes are needed, the researcher updates the proposal and sends it back for another review.
workflow.transitionMapNote: This section keeps the complete system-level status map for reference.
